# ISSUE_TEMPLATE

## Purpose
GitHub Issue 模板目錄，提供標準化的 Bug 回報和功能請求格式。

## Key Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `bug_report.md` | Bug 回報模板 |
| `feature_request.md` | 功能請求模板 |
| `config.yml` | Issue 模板配置 (空白 Issue 選項等) |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- YAML front matter 必須包含: name, about, title, labels, assignees
- Markdown 內容使用 GitHub Flavored Markdown

### Common Patterns
```yaml
---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---
```
